title: Asterisk AMI ConfBridge Concurrent Participant Load
app: Custom TA, HEC, or Universal Forwarder mapping Asterisk logs to `asterisk:pjsip`, `asterisk:cdr`, `asterisk:queue_log`, `asterisk:full`, `asterisk:messages`, `asterisk:security`, `asterisk:ami`
spl:
index=voip sourcetype="asterisk:ami" earliest=-4h
| eval action=coalesce(event, Action, "")
| eval bridge=coalesce(confbridge, Bridge, conference, "")
| where match(lower(action), "(?i)confbridge")
| eval join=if(match(lower(action), "(?i)join|enter"),1,0)
| eval leave=if(match(lower(action), "(?i)leave|end"),1,0)
| streamstats sum(join) as j sum(leave) as l by bridge
| eval participants=j-l
| timechart max(participants) by bridge
description: Large conferences stress CPU and licensing. Tracking concurrent Confbridge members prevents all-hands meltdowns.
value: Protects executive and investor calls; informs host sizing.
implementation: (1) AMI read-only user with Confbridge events. (2) Validate Action parsing. (3) Threshold alerts per bridge. (4) Correlate with MOS UC.
visualization: Area max concurrency; table peak by bridge.
grandmaExplanation: We track how crowded conference bridges are so big meetings stay stable.
